summary: Classified the five inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical is present. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, and fix PR execution are disabled for this job, and each open PR either has useful focused work, maintainer ownership, draft/waiting-author state, unresolved review-bot findings, or linked follow-up context.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with proof and linked open follow-up context; keep open for maintainer review outside this no-merge inventory shard.

Maintainer-owned draft with a linked open issue and no safe inventory close action; keep it open for maintainer follow-up.
